hero.headline: Hello, I'm Mokshith.
hero.sub_headline: I build scalable, highly available microservices and event-driven systems.
hero.mission: Using technology to make the world a better place, and to develop better technology.

experience.description: Migrated 5+ legacy monolithic services to a Microservices architecture on Kubernetes (EKS) utilizing custom Docker containers and Helm charts. Built scalable backend REST APIs, optimized complex PostgreSQL queries with Redis caching, and engineered an event-driven data pipeline leveraging Apache Kafka to process 10,000+ daily telemetry events.

Automated API contract validation for the JavaScript frontend utilizing Python, PyTest, and OpenAPI/Swagger specifications, reducing staging environment crashes by 40%. Engineered Python data pipelines to extract and parse unstructured JSON telemetry from Jenkins and Docker logs.

projects.title: Learning-Based Cache Optimization
projects.concept: Predict memory access patterns across trace datasets containing over 1 million requests.
projects.architecture: Trained a Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) sequence model using PyTorch and engineered feature extraction pipelines using Pandas.
projects.impact: Increased the cache hit rate by 12% compared to standard LRU baselines.

projects.title: Custom Scheduling Operator
projects.concept: Create intelligent scheduling logic to manage and optimize cluster resources.
projects.architecture: Engineered a production-grade Kubernetes operator in Go using CRDs and admission webhooks. Orchestrated full build and deployment pipeline with Docker and Make.
projects.impact: Reconciled 5,000 pods and reduced compute costs by 30% through intelligent scheduling.

projects.title: Decentralized Key-Value Store
projects.concept: Design a highly consistent, fault-tolerant decentralized storage system.
projects.architecture: Engineered a Go-based gossip protocol over gRPC for decentralized failure detection across a Docker-containerized cluster. Utilized Prometheus and Grafana for metrics.
projects.impact: Processed 15,000+ ops/sec and restored consistency in <100ms during simulated network partitions using CRDTs.

projects.title: Financial Education Platform
projects.concept: Process and dynamically render user spending data to deliver personalized financial insights.
projects.architecture: Full-stack React and Django application integrating OpenAI APIs. Orchestrated a Jenkins CI/CD deployment pipeline to AWS EC2.
projects.impact: Delivered insights with <2s latency, accelerated API response efficiency by 1.5x, and achieved zero-downtime updates via JWT session management.

certifications: Kubernetes Fundamentals Certification - The Linux Foundation
Elite Certification in Programming, Data Structures and Algorithms - NPTEL IIT Madras
